title: Deplanchea montana

The plant's classification is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the order Oxalidales. Deplanchea montana is native to New Caledonia. It is a part of the endemic plant species found in this region.
uses: Deplanchea montana is native to the tropical regions of Australia and is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to help in the treatment of wounds and skin infections.
